data.name: Stuck with my Ex's Family and ZOMBIES!?
data.detailed_description:
The Worst. Breakup. Ever.

You thought your biggest problem was your ex-girlfriend. You were wrong.

Welcome to "Stuck with my Ex's Family and ZOMBIES!?", an adult visual novel where a simple trip to return your ex's stuff turns into a desperate fight for survival. You play as Ethan (name customizable), a guy who just wanted a fresh start at college on a remote, sunny island. After a confusing and bitter breakup with your proud ex, Maddy, you figured it was over.

You were just trying to do the right thing. Drop off her things. Get some closure. Maybe get one last dig in.

Then the screaming started. Then the biting started. Now, the island is overrun with the undead, and the only safe place for miles is the one house you never wanted to step foot in again: your ex's family home.

  • 🧟 A Gripping Apocalypse Tale: Experience both the chaotic outbreak and the struggle to survive in its aftermath.

  • ⚖️ Trust & Doubt System: Your choices build relationships or breed suspicion, changing how characters see you.

  • 🤹Diverse Endings: Unlock endings ranging from hopeful and wholesome to brutally dark.

  • 🎞️High-Quality Animations and Artwork: Features 30+ animations and 400+ artworks for enhanced immersion.

  • 💏Shape Your Relationships: Form bonds with a diverse cast of over 25 characters. Play your way, pursuing whomever you connect with, whether they are male, female, or exploring a polyamorous path.

  • 🥵Animated Intimacy: Includes explicitly animated sex scenes.

  • 🍿Dynamic Storytelling: A unique blend of humor, drama, and erotic tension.

  • 🫦Content Variety: Featuring kinks and themes including, but not limited to: Straight, Voyeurism, Exhibitionism, Teasing, MILF, Femboy, Threesome, Trans, Bully, Submission, Domination, Lesbian content and many many more.

  • 🙊Multi-Language Support: Fully translated for English, Spanish, Portuguese-BR, Chinese (Simplified), Japanese, and Russian.

Meet some of your new Roommates for the Apocalypse

  • Ethan (You Can Change His Name, But Not His Luck) - That's you! Or at least, the you who has to navigate a zombie-infested hellscape while dealing with... well, see below.

  • Madison "Maddy" Blake - Your proud and angry ex-girlfriend, whose unresolved breakup is now a dangerous complication for your survival.

  • Rebecca Blake - Maddy's mother, a pediatrician whose nurturing warmth is the group's last bastion of comfort and stability.

  • Zoey Blake - Maddy's younger sister, a live-streamer treating the apocalypse as her most dramatic content opportunity yet.

  • Ruby West - Maddy's aunt, a yoga instructor striving to maintain her confident facade amid the chaos.

  • Nina Kim - A brilliant, mechanically-gifted professor who finds the apocalypse to be the ultimate problem to solve.

  • Derek Santos - A resourceful hustler who sees the collapse of society as the perfect chance to make a fast profit.

  • Jamie Poarch - A gentle femboy who finds more comfort in his online worlds than in the terrifying real one.

  • Sabrina Rochefort - A disciplined and wealthy aspiring athlete used to being in control of a world that has now spun into chaos.

Survival is Just the Beginning

This isn't just about barricading doors and scavenging for food. This is about navigating a house filled with more tension than zombies. Old flames, new secrets, and a jealous "friend" pulling the strings mean every conversation is a potential landmine. Can you uncover the truth behind your breakup and the real cause of the outbreak before it's too late?

Gameplay That Packs a Punch (and a Pew-Pew)

  • An Island to Explore: The island is your sandbox! From the overrun university campus and overgrown forests to the abandoned marina, every location holds resources, secrets, and danger. Characters have their own schedules and needs, making the world feel alive, even when most of it is undead. Explore more than 21+ separate locations in the game.

  • Turn-Based Combat & Adventure: When diplomacy (or running away) fails, you'll need to fight. Use a strategic turn-based system to take on the zombie hordes. Manage your party, use the environment, and make every action count in tense, adventure-packed encounters.

  • Fun Mini-Games: From frantic quick-time events during horde attacks to complex hacking puzzles and delicate relationship-building moments, a variety of mini-games will keep you on your toes.

  • A Desperate Mission: Your goal is clear: get from the heart of the island to the shore, find a boat, and ESCAPE. But the path is riddled with undead, betrayals, and impossible choices. Who will you save? Who will you trust?

And Yes, It Gets... Intimate.

When the world ends, inhibitions tend to follow. Forge deep (and steamy) connections with the women you're surviving with. Heal old wounds with your ex, find comfort in a surprising new ally, or give in to the chaotic energy of the end of the world.

  • Animated Love Scenes: Experience beautifully rendered and animated intimate scenes with a variety of kinks and scenarios.

  • Build Your Harem: Your choices determine your relationships. Pursue one true love, or see if you can manage the volatile dynamics of a post-apocalyptic polycule.

  • Everything is Optional: Focus on the story, the survival, or the romance - it’s your adventure.

And at last…

Thank you for checking out our game. We're not just building a world; we're creating a chaotic, character-driven comedy-thriller where every choice matters. Remember: in this outbreak, the zombies are the background noise. The real drama is between the survivors.

Do you have what it takes to survive the hordes, expose the truth, and navigate the complicated path to get the girl(s)?

Gear up,

The Puushi-Sama Team

data.short_description: Survive a zombie apocalypse trapped with your angry ex and her family! This adult visual novel features animated NSFW scenes, a customizable harem, and tense turn-based combat. Will you escape the island with your life and new loves?

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 7 (64-bit) or newer
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz Dual-Core processor
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 240 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.9 (Mavericks) or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 or Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 240 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04 or newer / SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz Dual-Core processor
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 240 MB 可用空間
